name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax Title Loans is located at 792 N Gilbert Rd, Gilbert, AZ 85234. Google reviewers rate the branch 5.0 stars across 607 reviews. Call +1 480-448-6200.
description_long:
TitleMax is an established title lending company with a location at 3190 Summer Avenue in Memphis, Tennessee, operating since February 2007. The company specializes in providing fast cash solutions to consumers who need emergency funds quickly. Their primary business model revolves around using vehicle titles as collateral to secure loans, allowing borrowers to retain vehicle access while receiving cash. The Memphis TN 9 location is bilingual and maintains extended hours (Monday-Friday until 6-7pm, Saturday until 4pm) to accommodate working customers. TitleMax operates across 11 states including Arizona, Delaware, Idaho, Kansas, Missouri, Mississippi, South Carolina, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, and Wisconsin.

The company offers two primary product lines at this location: Title Pledges with Flex Lines of Credit, and unsecured personal loans. Title pledges are secured loans where customers pledge their vehicle title to borrow money while continuing to drive their vehicle. These require only a clear vehicle title, valid government ID, and a credit check (though most credit types are accepted). The evaluation focuses on vehicle value, cash need, and repayment ability rather than credit score alone. Additionally, TitleMax offers unsecured flexible lines of credit that customers can draw from all at once or gradually up to their approved limit. The unsecured personal loans require valid ID, recent bank statements showing recurring deposits, and proof of income.

TitleMax differentiates itself through same-day cash approval and disbursement, acceptance of most credit types (not just prime credit), competitive rates positioning, and the unique benefit of keeping your vehicle while using it as collateral for title loans. The location has accumulated 481+ Google reviews with a 5.0/5 average rating, with multiple customer testimonials highlighting specific staff members (particularly Nicole, Joyce, Jonathan, and Shana) for professionalism and knowledge. The company emphasizes flexibility in their product offerings, allowing customers to choose between secured title-based loans and unsecured personal loans depending on their circumstances and comfort level.

However, consumers should approach title loans with caution. While the website emphasizes competitive rates and most credit types being accepted, title loans are inherently high-risk products that can result in vehicle repossession if payments are missed. The website does not disclose APR ranges, fees, or repayment terms, making it impossible to assess actual cost. Title loans are designed for emergency situations only and should not be viewed as a sustainable borrowing solution. The emphasis on same-day cash and easy approval, combined with non-disclosure of rates, suggests these products likely carry significantly higher costs than traditional personal loans or credit union alternatives.
pros: Same-day cash approval and funding for qualified applicants
Accepts most credit types, not solely based on credit score—considers vehicle value and repayment ability
Keep your vehicle while using title as collateral (title pledge product)
Bilingual staff available at this location
Extended weekday hours (9am-7pm Monday and Friday) and Saturday service (9am-4pm)
5.0/5 average rating across 481+ Google reviews with named staff recognition
Flexible line of credit option allows customers to draw funds as needed up to limit
cons: APR rates, fees, and repayment terms not disclosed on website—actual cost comparison impossible
Title loans carry vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed
No rate caps mentioned; described as 'competitive' without transparency about market comparison
Unsecured personal loan product limited to 10 specific states (excludes most U.S.)
No information provided about hardship options, deferment, or alternatives if borrower cannot pay
best_for: Vehicle owners in emergency financial situations needing immediate cash (under $1-5K typically)
Borrowers with poor credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Those who need flexible access to credit and want to draw funds as needed rather than lump sum
Memphis-area residents seeking in-person financial services with extended operating hours
diagnosis: TitleMax title loans are best for Memphis-area vehicle owners facing genuine emergency expenses (car repairs, medical bills, utilities) who lack access to traditional credit and need immediate cash. The critical caveat is that title loans are expensive, high-risk debt with vehicle repossession consequences—they should only be considered after exhausting alternatives like credit union PALs, employer advances, family loans, or non-profit assistance programs. The complete lack of rate transparency on the website is a red flag; borrowers must obtain full disclosure of APR, fees, and terms before committing.
services: Title pledge loans secured by vehicle title
Flex line of credit (secured by title) with flexible withdrawal options
Same-day loan approval and cash disbursement
Online account management portal for title loans
Online account management portal for personal loans
In-person consultations and applications at physical location
Line of credit management and draw administration
